doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The named HUD office co-issuance, document code (TRF-2026-IL), and the asserted blanket statements about 5-day notice legal effects are not verifiable and are characteristic of an invented tenant “fact sheet.”
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document’s specific identifiers and claims (e.g., “HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL,” HUD “Co-issued” with an “Illinois Attorney General Tenant Bulletin,” and the asserted legal consequences that tenants have no right to cure or hearing) do not match verifiable, widely established HUD/Illinois legal guidance and appear invented.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The named HUD office co-issuance, document code (TRF-2026-IL), and the asserted blanket statements about 5-day notice legal effects are not verifiable and are characteristic of an invented tenant “fact sheet.”
